mapper.select: SELECT uf.id, uf.product_id, p.title AS product_title, p.brief AS product_brief, pi.url AS main_image_url, uf.created_at FROM user_favorite uf LEFT JOIN product p ON uf.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id AND pi.image_type = 0 WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT uf.id, uf.product_id, p.title AS product_title, p.brief AS product_brief, pi.url AS main_image_url, uf.created_at FROM user_favorite uf LEFT JOIN product p ON uf.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id AND pi.image_type = 0 WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC
